channel.title: Event on vSoliloquy
channel.description: Recent content in Event on vSoliloquy

item.title: 【メモ】個人的に気になる VMware Explore 2022 US セッション
item.description: 概要 US 時間で 8/29 から VMware Explore 2022 US が開催されます。自分用のメモですが vSphere 関連の気になるセッションへのリンクをまとめておきます。 vSphere 10 New and Exciting Things About vSphere That You Absolutely Need to Know [CEIB1574US] VMware vSphere – The New Features [CEIM2230US] What’s New in vMotion and Workload Mobility [CEIB1501USD] vSphere+ and vSAN+: The Next Evolution of VMware Enterprise Workload Platform [CMK2208US] Performance & Resource Management Extreme Performance Series: vSphere Advanced Performance Tutorial [CEIT1097US] Storage Get to Know the Next-Generation of vSAN Architecture [CEIB2172US] Core Storage Best Practice Deep Dive [CEIB1382USD] Security How the vSphere Engineer Became a Critical Part of Modern Security Design [SECB2350US] Deploying Full-Stack Security for Enterprise Workloads with VMware Cloud Foundation [CEIB3019US] Troubleshooting Advanced Troubleshooting of ESXi Server 7.
